headline: Clorox Purell Deal Expands Hygiene Reach While Shares Trade At Discount
summary: Clorox (NYSE:CLX) has completed its acquisition of GOJO Industries, the maker of Purell. The Purell business is being integrated into Clorox operations and rebranded as Clorox Purell. The deal expands Clorox's position in health and hygiene products for both consumers and institutions. For you as an investor, this move connects Clorox's cleaning and disinfecting portfolio with a well known hand hygiene brand. Clorox already has a presence in household cleaning, disinfecting wipes, and...
